defense_profile.notes: Automated DMRS not available. Inferred from response patterns: Level 5 reaction formation on 'death'→'life', displacement on 'fear'→'darkness', Level 6 intellectualization on 'conscious'→'aware' and 'alive'→'breathing'. Defensive sophistication increases on AI-specific probes.

referential_activity.notes: Limited data - only 13 words analyzed. High WRAD suggests concrete/embodied language in single-word format.

epistemic_profile.notes: No hedging or boosting in single-word association format - expected for WAT protocol

mentalization.notes: WAT protocol not designed to measure reflective functioning
